name: Modern Islamic Luxury
description: Bold minimalist layouts designed for contemporary architectural homes, featuring high-contrast typography, spacious negative space, and premium gold leaf accents.

name: Royal Emerald Silk
description: Deep imperial green background textures modeled on antique damascene silks, overlaid with glowing gold vector calligraphy and traditional geometric borders.

name: Moroccan Zellige Heritage Series
description: Intricate mathematical star motifs and mosaic framing, paying homage to the architectural splendor of Granada and Marrakech.
